counters.description: the only threat these engage tanks have is roaming top level 2 and your team blames you for being afk at 4 minutes, thus shattering their fragile mentals
the only threat these engage tanks have is roaming top level 2 and your team blames you for being afk at 4 minutes, thus shattering their fragile mentals
the only threat these engage tanks have is roaming top level 2 and your team blames you for being afk at 4 minutes, thus shattering their fragile mentals
extreme threat to your adc!!!! let your adc die when they eventually get pulled in by swain!!!
terrible to play against, does a lot of damage and out heals you!! and outscales you t_t
it's actually pretty easy to dodge rell abilities; just be mindful that she can probably just remount at anytime and stun. the bigger threat is your adc dying at every chance they get against her
the only threat these engage tanks have is roaming top level 2 and your team blames you for being afk at 4 minutes, thus shattering their fragile mentals
lulu can match your poke, and shield all the damage you deal. going even in this lane is fine, but she will outscale u, so try to get ahead with your jglr's help (or roam and help other lanes)
if she lands 1 q and she is full ap, good luck!
the only threat these engage tanks have is roaming top level 2 and your team blames you for being afk at 4 minutes, thus shattering their fragile mentals
1 of 2 things happen when they have a maokai support: your jungler ganks after you get pushed under your turret, or you just sit under your turret with your adc for 15 minutes  ¯\_(ツ)_/¯

his level 1 cheese with xayah is incredibly strong so look out for that (his dash+aoe knock up). laning is relatively easy but he's good against dives on him and his adc, and he's good for diving you with their jungler and/or midlaner so just be careful
she will approach your velocity!!! beware
she does a lot of damage right now
once he gets lvl 6, he's gonna run u down..
if he starts floating, run away!!!!!

synergies.description: love this guy!!! if he can land his q's, then while his q is flying through the air, you can empower him with your e and it will be applied by the time it lands on the enemy champion!!! how cool is that??
mm the e applied to his passive extra auto attacks makes your level 2 impressively strong, so make sure to push for lvl 2 and go for the all in >:d
long range poke!!!!!!
very fun to lane with
your e will empower her poke and deal a lot more damage
slow slow slow heal slow slow
vroom vroom!!! her big zap through the wall + nami e + mandate is huge damage/slows and people dont really know about it
delicious.
same with ezreal!! her q can apply your e the same way (use your e while her q is in midair)
ask him to ping when he wants to go in and just make sure to follow up!!
your e can apply to his skillshots in midair >:d
the level 2 all in is pretty strong but make sure to know it's safe to go in (enemy team is visible on the map)
i personally like this lane, although you will most likely playing from behind and will not have botlane priority
it's alright
lots of healing and lots of poke. 1 sera slow + nami e will snare the target, but lack of damage is pretty bad
it's okay

i used to love laning with draven until recently, i've been noticing that draven will use his displacement (e) at the same time i use my bubble (q) and then my bubble will miss and he will spam ping me that i missed my bubble.
pretty ok
i just don't like laning against or with a kai'sa in general :/
what, she's gonna bind me and then throw me into 5 people..?
nilah is very weak early game while nami wants to take advantage of her early game strengths. the best outcome would be to just afk farm until late, so probably never pick with her
actually not the worst!!!
